title: Hum Tum Aur Woo
overview: Three friends, Fawad, Zafar and Raja Yasir, navigate love, relationships and friendship. Charming and witty Fawad falls in love with Sara, but their relationship is put to the test when Woo, a quirky and eccentric friend, gets involved.
